title: Wasp Removal in Tompkinsville, Staten Island | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional wasp removal services in Tompkinsville, Staten Island. Safe nest elimination for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for $350-$550 flat-rate service.
intro: Dealing with aggressive wasps near your Tompkinsville home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, safe wasp removal services throughout this historic Staten Island neighborhood. Our licensed technicians safely eliminate wasp nests from residential properties, storefronts along Bay Street, and commercial buildings, protecting your family and customers from painful stings.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Tompkinsville residents for years with same-day wasp removal services and transparent pricing from $350-$550. Our experienced technicians use proven methods to safely remove nests from eaves, porches, and hard-to-reach areas while ensuring complete protection for your property.
localContext: Tompkinsville's mix of Victorian homes, multi-family dwellings, and waterfront businesses near the Staten Island Ferry terminal creates numerous nesting opportunities for wasps in soffits, attics, and building overhangs. The neighborhood's tree-lined streets and proximity to parks like Von Briesen Park make properties particularly attractive to yellow jackets, paper wasps, and hornets during warmer months.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a wasp nest in Tompkinsville?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day wasp removal service throughout Tompkinsville and Staten Island. Most wasp nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, depending on nest location and size. We prioritize emergency calls involving aggressive wasps near entrances or high-traffic areas.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 wasp removal price?
faqs.answer: Our flat-rate pricing includes complete inspection, safe nest removal, treatment of the affected area to prevent return, and proper disposal. The final cost depends on nest location, size, and accessibility. We provide upfront quotes with no hidden fees before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are wasp removal treatments safe for my Tompkinsville home and family?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and professional-grade equipment designed for safe wasp elimination. Our technicians are fully licensed and trained in proper application methods that protect children, pets, and the environment while effectively eliminating wasp colonies.

faqs.question: Do you handle wasps in multi-family buildings common in Tompkinsville?
faqs.answer: Yes, we regularly service apartment buildings, townhouses, and multi-family properties throughout Tompkinsville. We work with property managers and landlords to safely remove wasp nests from common areas, individual units, rooflines, and shared spaces while minimizing disruption to residents.
